title: The Sea Train Project
description: Franky tries to stop the train carrying Tom away, and the tragedy transforms Cutty Flam into the man who will become Franky.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Franky, Kalifa, Tom, Iceburg, Spandam. Franky tries to stop the train carrying Tom away, and the tragedy transforms Cutty Flam into the man who will become Franky.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Just you watch, I'm gonna build

dialogue.speaker: Kalifa
dialogue.text: NMA!! Like heck you could win!

summary: Franky tries to stop the train carrying Tom away, and the tragedy transforms Cutty Flam into the man who will become Franky.
